shortDescription.en: Seasoned sausage meat wrapped in golden puff pastry.
shortDescription.zh: 调味香肠肉包在金黄酥皮中烘烤。
shortDescription.nl: Gekruid worstvlees verpakt in goudbruin bladerdeeg.

cookingProfile.en: It is flaky outside and meaty inside, usually eaten as a snack or quick lunch.
cookingProfile.zh: 外层酥松、内里肉馅扎实，常作小吃或快捷午餐。
cookingProfile.nl: Bladerig van buiten en vlezig vanbinnen, vaak als snack of snelle lunch.

description.en: A bakery and cafe staple where pastry quality and sausage filling matter.
description.zh: 烘焙店和咖啡馆常见小食，重点是酥皮和香肠肉馅。
description.nl: Een bakkerij- en cafénietje waarbij deeg en worstvulling tellen.

orderVerdict.en: Good as a quick savory snack; heavier than a plain pastry.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合作快速咸味小吃；比普通酥皮点心更厚重。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als snelle hartige snack; zwaarder dan gewoon gebak.
